blended.narrative: Bromont is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
